name: spam_burst
description: 100 near-duplicate messages from the same sender within an hour. external_id differs per message; content is identical up to cosmetic whitespace. Validates rate-limit and content-dedup interaction.

message_template.text: @cgao bug: deploy broken, postgres refusing connections
message_template.whitespace_variants: each message gets randomized leading/trailing whitespace and line breaks

expect.note: external_id is part of dedup_key, so distinct external_ids with identical content do NOT collapse. Rate-limit (rate_limit_per_repo_per_hour) is the gate that bounds session creation. ≥95% suppression is the product of rate-limit + downstream similarity rejection, not dedup_key alone.
